steps.title: Identify the missing action in the cause-effect sequence
steps.content: The passage shows: reduced flow velocity causes particles to deposit. For particles to deposit, the ability to suspend them must be stopped. The blank needs a word meaning to stop or halt.

steps.title: Match the stopping action
steps.content: ”Interrupting” means to stop or break a process — when reduced velocity interrupts particle suspension, the particles settle and deposit. The other three choices either suggest strengthening suspension (compounding and expediting) or don't capture what happens to particles (obscuring). This matches choice C — C is correct.
